title: Oil market: Brent retreats from $96.24 spike to $94.63 settlement — CNBC coverage
snippet: Brent crude pulled back from $96.24 intraday spike to settle at $94.63. WTI at $91.32. Crude oil retreats from highs as Iran-Israel mutual halt reduces immediate risk premium.
tag_reason: Additional CNBC coverage of same oil price movement covered in src-1658; confirms Brent $94.63 settlement
